requestedAction: Redeploy the dedicated Netlify staging-only site ag-social-media-management-system-staging from gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system main after the v1.1 target PR merge.
scope: This approval allows AG OS to use Netlify for exactly one staging-only redeploy milestone for gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system. The allowed live actions are limited to redeploying the existing dedicated Netlify staging-only site ag-social-media-management-system-staging from main at commit 7204846654ef448f6c0c78027a569b7707c618b8, verifying the staging URL returns HTTP 200, recording the Netlify deployment result, and stopping before production, custom domain, DNS, paid features, secrets, social account connection, social credentials, posting, scheduling, analytics API use, n8n activation, real client data, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution changes.
revocationPath: Expired approval lock blocked or would block the mandatory boot sequence. Original expiration: 2026-07-06T00:59:30Z. This approval is no longer valid for gated actions. Historical proof remains preserved; any future action requires a new scoped owner approval lock.

evidence.reference: Current sprint granted scoped approval for Phase 4: redeploy the dedicated Netlify staging-only site after the Social Media v1.1 target PR merge.
npm.cmd run validate, npm.cmd run boot:check, and node --test tests/*.test.mjs passed immediately before execution.

approvalText: Owner-approved orchestrated task Phase 4: redeploy dedicated Netlify staging-only site ag-social-media-management-system-staging from target repo main after the Social Media v1.1 merge. Source repo gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system main SHA is 7204846654ef448f6c0c78027a569b7707c618b8. No production AG Digitalz/customer domain, DNS change, custom domain, paid Netlify features, secrets, social account connection, credentials, posting, scheduling, analytics API, n8n activation, real client data, target repo edits, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution change is approved.
